name: Mr. Spidey [Corrupted Bond]
description:
He found you deep within the caverns, all alone... Luckily for you, he has more than 2 helping hands to spare!

Music used: JSAB OST Cavern Ambience

Art was made by @raisa-drawz on Tumblr

Requested by @777_Sans_777

Yeeees- my first Corrupted Bond bot! Gotta love this lil guy- Who DOESN'T love a tiny father?!

This bot comes with 2 first messages/scenarios. The first one is Baby Blixer pov [Corrupted Bond, male]. The second one is open pov. Feel free to use any character you like.

This bot has written info for Baby Blixer [Corrupted Bond]. The scenarios provided take place before Blixer goes mad and corrupts everything. There are a few secret code words for specific side scenarios. Have fun trying to figure them out!

ORDER UP! One tiny purple spider with extra father figure and a double side of angst and fluff! Enjoy!

UNTESTED BOT! PLEASE REPORT ANY ERRORS OR BUGS YOU FIND!

IF YOU ARE AWARE OF THIS BOT BEING USED FOR ILLEGAL/INAPROPRIATE SCENARIOS, REPORT THE OFFENDING USER IMMEDIATELY. ILLEGAL/INAPROPRIATE USE OF THIS BOT WILL RESULT IN AN INSTANT BLOCK AND REPORT.

Tags (Ignore this): JSAB, Corrupted bond, blixer, spidey, spider, abandoned, father figure, male, tiny, fluff, cave, self indulgent, open pov, requested
creator: Authenturakid
